label: Term Structure
description: Stacked bar chart showing exposure by maturity bucket across short, medium, and long dated positions.

0.1.note: — WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets.

0.5.note: — no direct lib/mocks imports in widget file.

0.8.note: applied — added hasError -> rose-400 message guard.

l0.notes: 0.1 pass — WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets. 0.2 pass — requiredEntitlements: [execution-basic, execution-full]. 0.3 pass — availableOn: [risk]. 0.4 pass — no any types or @ts-ignore. 0.5 pass — no direct lib/mocks imports in widget file. 0.6 fix applied — added isLoading -> Spinner guard. 0.7 pass — termStructureData.length === 0 guard already present. 0.8 fix applied — added hasError -> rose-400 message guard. 0.9 pass — no dead code.

1.1.note: — reads termStructureData exclusively from useRiskData() hook.

1.2.note: — use-risk-page-data.ts calls useGlobalScope() and derives scopeStrategyIds; termStructureData sourced from varData.termStructure which comes from scoped API call.

1.3.note: — scopeStrategyIds filters riskLimits; org filter propagates via scope.

1.4.note: — clientIds threaded through getStrategyIdsForScope in use-risk-page-data.

1.7.note: — no reference data in widget file; context re-exports MOCK_STRATEGIES etc. from lib/mocks (acceptable as domain context boundary).

l1.notes: 1.1 pass — reads termStructureData exclusively from useRiskData() hook. 1.2 pass — use-risk-page-data.ts calls useGlobalScope() and derives scopeStrategyIds; termStructureData sourced from varData.termStructure which comes from scoped API call. 1.3 pass — scopeStrategyIds filters riskLimits; org filter propagates via scope. 1.4 pass — clientIds threaded through getStrategyIdsForScope in use-risk-page-data. 1.5 pass — strategyIds threaded through getStrategyIdsForScope. 1.6 pass — scopeStrategyIds.length === 0 returns full unfiltered dataset (scopeReductionFactor=1.0). 1.7 pass — no reference data in widget file; context re-exports MOCK_STRATEGIES etc. from lib/mocks (acceptable as domain context boundary).

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab and f9f29ea. Re-audit only if wiring test fails or entitlements change.

3.1.note: Applies to: live ✓, paper ✓, batch ✓. Read-only stacked bar chart; no mode-specific behavior.

3.2.note: isBatchMode in context; not used by this widget.

3.5.note: Paper mode: same chart with paper positions classified by maturity.

l3.notes: Human must verify 3.4 (batch indicator visible in layout).

4.1.note: No interactive buttons — read-only chart widget.

4.6.note: No entitlement checks in render path.

l4.notes: Human must verify 4.8 (chart fills widget bounds without overflow).

5.1.note: Target strategies: all risk-bearing strategies with expiring positions. DeFi/CeFi perpetuals classified as Overnight. Shows maturity distribution across defi/cefi/tradfi/sports.

l6.notes: L1.5 harness spec: tests/widgets/risk/risk-term-structure.test.tsx — 10 tests covering loading/error/empty/populated states. Per ui_widget_test_rollout_2026_04_24.plan.md Phase 5.

7.1.note: No hardcoded hex colors. Bar fills use var(--surface-config), var(--surface-trading), var(--surface-markets), var(--surface-strategy) tokens.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: No useEffect/useMemo in widget. No inline deps.

8.1.note: text-[9px] replaced with text-nano tokens per consolidated globals.css; no arbitrary typography classes remain.

8.3.note: Uses Spinner shared component. Chart via Recharts.

8.4.note: Agent: no img without alt, no bare div onClick, no unlabelled inputs. Display-only.

8.5.note: Human: resize test at minW=4, minH=3 required.

l8.notes: 8.1 fixed (tokens applied). 8.2-8.4 pass. 8.5 needs human verification.

keepSeparate.rationale: Unique maturity/term structure visualization; no equivalent widget.

relationships.notes: Chart uses surface tokens for consistent asset-class color coding.

dataContract.notes: termStructureData computed in use-risk-page-data.ts from positions bucketed by maturity.

gaps: DeFi/CeFi perpetuals classified as Overnight — may need more granular classification for funding settlement cycles

findings.description: L0.6: Added isLoading -> Spinner guard (was missing)
L0.8: Added hasError -> error message guard (was missing)
risk-term-structure-widget.tsx — ~8 user-visible strings (footnote text, legend labels)
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: risk-term-structure-widget.tsx — text-[9px] on footnote and chart tick labels (fontSize={9} in Recharts props)
findings.fix: Applied text-micro (10px), text-nano (9px), text-caption (11px) tokens per consolidated globals.css; arbitrary text-[Npx] classes removed

findings.description: risk-term-structure-widget.tsx: stacked bar chart by maturity bucket is not an 'interpolated term structure' in the fixed-income sense — buckets are discrete (Overnight/1W/1M/etc). Label 'DeFi/CeFi perpetuals classified as Overnight (8h funding settlement)' is a static footnote; no tenor interpolation between buckets is computed.
findings.deferReason: Design intent per widget description ('stacked bar chart: exposure by maturity bucket'). If a curve view is desired, it belongs in a new 'term structure curve' widget with interp config. Logged.
